popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  alternate name Dulce of Aragon.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/ARAGON%20&%20CATALONIA.htm#Petronilladied1174B as of 2/8/20165

Infanta doña DULCIA de Aragón ([1160]-Coimbra 1 Sep 1198, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort於1152年4月4日出生在西班牙阿拉格昂時，她的父親Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona38歲，母親Rainha Petronilla de Aragón15歲。她和Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal至少有6個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1198年9月11日在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉享年46歲，埋葬在葡萄牙可布拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort于1152年4月4日出生在西班牙阿拉格昂时，她的父亲Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona38岁，母亲Rainha Petronilla de Aragón15岁。她和Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal至少有6个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于1198年9月11日在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉享年46岁，埋葬在葡萄牙可布拉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dulce
meanings: A female name meaning sweet, pleasant, or gentle. Some say it is the same as Dousie.

en.lifeSummary: When Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort was born on 4 April 1152, in Aragón, Spain, her father, Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona, was 38 and her mother, Rainha Petronilla de Aragón, was 15. She had at least 6 sons and 7 daughters with Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. She died on 11 September 1198, in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, at the age of 46, and was buried in Coimbra, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort est née le 4 avril 1152, à Aragón, Espagne, son père, Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Rainha Petronilla de Aragón, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles avec Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. Elle est décédée le 11 septembre 1198, à Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Coimbra, Portugal.

de.Borgo San Dalmazzo, Privincia di Cuneo,: Borgo San Dalmazzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien
de.lifeSummary: Als Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort am 4. April 1152 in Aragón, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona 38 und ihre Mutter Rainha Petronilla de Aragón 15. Sie hatte mit Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. September 1198 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal und wurde in Coimbra, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort è nata il il 4 aprile 1152 nel Aragón, Spagna, sua padre, Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Rainha Petronilla de Aragón, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie con Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. Morì il 11 settembre 1198, nel Coimbra, Coimbra, Portogallo, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Coimbra, Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consortが1152年4月4日にスペインアラグoンで生まれた時，父Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelonaは38歳，母Rainha Petronilla de Aragónは15歳であった。彼女はSancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugalとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1198年9月11日にポルトガルコインブラコインブラで46歳で死去し，ポルトガルコインブラにて埋葬された。

ko.Borgo San Dalmazzo, Privincia di Cuneo,: 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 볼고 산 다마즈오
ko.lifeSummary: Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort(이)가 1152년 4월 4일 스페인 아라그o에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rainha Petronilla de Aragón(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1198년 9월 11일 포르투갈 코임브라 코임브라에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 코임브라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort nasceu em 4 de abril de 1152, em Aragón, Espanha, seu pai, Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Rainha Petronilla de Aragón, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas com Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. Ela faleceu em 11 de setembro de 1198, em Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Coimbra, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort родилась 4 апреля 1152 г. в местности арагoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Rainha Petronilla de Aragón, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей от Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. Она умерла 11 сентября 1198 г. в местности коимбра, коимбра, Португалия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности коимбра, Португалия.

Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas con Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. Murió el 11 de septiembre de 1198, en Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Coimbra, Portugal.
